feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Deprecation of SOAP APIs for Asset Master Data and Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0563
entry.content:
I am reviewing the system changes outlined in the "Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2608" on the SAP Help Portal.

Regarding the "Deprecation of SOAP APIs for Asset Master Data and Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0563":
It states that the SOAP APIs and communication scenario SAP_COM_0563 are being deprecated, but when exactly will they be decommissioned?

I am aware that deprecated apps remain valid for at least 12 months, as indicated on the page below; does this same rule apply to APIs?
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/53e36b5493804bcdb3f6f14de8b487dd/5efa551420f24d738131134c8101168a.html?locale=en-US

We currently use these SOAP APIs for asset master data creation and need to make modifications; I would like to know the exact decommissioning date to plan our modification schedule.

entry.title: Can the requester specify/select an ad-hoc approver when creating a Supplier Invoice (Parked as Comp
entry.content:
*Title:** Can the requester specify/select an ad-hoc approver when creating a Supplier Invoice (Parked as Complete Workflow / WS00800303) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

**Body:**

We are implementing the Flexible Workflow for Supplier Invoices (Workflow for Parked Invoice as Complete, WS00800303) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

In the "Manage Workflows for Supplier Invoices" app, we understand that approvers are determined by pre-configured rules (Role, Manager of Creator, Cost Center Responsible, specific User, or Team).

Our question: **Is it possible for the requester (the person creating the supplier invoice) to manually select/specify an approver at the time the invoice is created/submitted, similar to the "Ad-hoc Approver" functionality available for Purchase Orders in the "Manage Purchase Orders" app?**

Specifically:
1. Does the Supplier Invoice flexible workflow scenario (WS00800303 / WS00800251) support an ad-hoc approver step where the initiator can pick a user at runtime?
2. If not available out-of-the-box, is there a supported extension point (e.g., BAdI MRM_WORKFLOW_AGENTS) to let the invoice creator choose the approver dynamically?
3. Is this on SAP's roadmap, given that Ad-hoc Approver already exists for PO workflows?

Any confirmation from SAP or real-world configuration experience would be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: MRP Run for FG Material Considers Supply and Demand from Other WBS Elements
entry.content:
Issue Description:

We are executing MRP for a Finished Goods (FG) material assigned to a specific WBS element.

Business Requirement:
When MRP is run for the FG material with a selected WBS, the system should generate procurement proposals (Purchase Requisitions and/or Production Orders) only for that WBS. The planning should be restricted to the selected WBS and should not consider supply or demand from other WBS elements.

Current Behavior:
After executing MRP for the FG material, the system considers dependent requirements, planned orders, and production orders belonging to other WBS elements while calculating the procurement proposals. As a result, the generated procurement proposals are influenced by other WBS elements instead of being planned independently for the selected WBS.

Expected Behavior:
The MRP run should be restricted to the selected WBS so that procurement proposals are generated exclusively for that WBS.

In SAP ECC and SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud/On-Premise, this requirement can be achieved using transaction MD51.

entry.title: Matchning incoming payment automatically without leading zero
entry.content:
Hi, 

We are trying to create rules so incoming payments can be matched automatically in the Bank statement. 

The problem is that in the Customer Line items we have a field that starts with zero, and the customer pays without the zeros. 
Example 000000672026REPP but the customer send us this reference CINV 672026REPP. 

I have read and found that we should use Interpretation Algorithms 026 "Search for reference document number with leading zero, if <10". I have connected this algorithm to external transaction that I have added to on the bank statement row. 

But I don´t get it work, because on the rule I can´t choose this algorithm. How can I solve this?

I 

 

 

 

/Olivia

entry.title: Bank Communication Capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Portugal
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to implement the following bank communication services in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Exchange Rates Reception
SEPA Credit Transfer (SEPA CT)
MT101 Payment Orders
Portuguese Tax Payments (DUC), Social Security Payments, and Multibank References
Confirming Payment Orders
SEPA Direct Debit (SEPA DD)

Thanks!

entry.title: Include G/L Accounts to Cash Flow Analyzer
entry.content: We are currently trying to implement Hedging for ROMER in AT(7390,7380,7379) and testing the ‘cash flow analyzer’. According to predefined filterssee in separate attachment (User Manual – Hedging)- we tested the cash flow analyzer.

entry.title: PO Text Auto populate at Header text
entry.content:
Dear team,

We need the Header Text on the Purchase order form to be auto-populated in the Me21N screen and editable for each text ID, for example header Text, warranty, and Shipping details.

entry.title: Section Code 192 Not Visible in TDS Report – Guidance Required
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are facing an issue with the India TDS report in our SAP system. The TDS transactions posted under Section Code 192 (Salary TDS) are not appearing in the report.

We have verified the relevant configurations and postings; however, we are still unable to locate Section Code 192 in the report output.

We request your guidance on the following:

  1. Is Section Code 192 supported in this particular TDS report?
  2. If yes, are there any additional configurations or prerequisites required to make it visible?
  3. Is there a separate report or application where Section Code 192 data can be viewed?
  4. Kindly advise the standard process to display or extract Section Code 192 information from the system.

 

Your assistance in identifying the root cause and guiding us on the correct approach would be highly appreciated.

Thank you for your support.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Can the Tax Code be Edited in a Debit Memo Created with Reference to a Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a question regarding the standard behavior in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

When creating a Debit Memo with reference to a Sales Order, I noticed that the Tax Code is not editable.

I would like to confirm the following:

  1. Is there any standard configuration or business process that allows the Tax Code to be changed manually in the Debit Memo?
  2. If manual editing is not supported, what is the recommended SAP approach when a different tax code is required for the Debit Memo?

Any insights or references to SAP documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance !

Best regards, 

HY

entry.title: Internal Manage Early Numbering
entry.content:
METHOD earlynumbering_create.
    "Declare Variable First
    DATA: number_range_key               TYPE cl_numberrange_runtime=>nr_number,
          number_range_return_code       TYPE cl_numberrange_runtime=>nr_returncode,
          number_range_returned_quantity TYPE cl_numberrange_runtime=>nr_quantity.

    LOOP AT entities into DATA(ls_entity).
        "Try Calling The Method First
        TRY.
            cl_numberrange_runtime=>number_get(
              EXPORTING
                nr_range_nr       = '01'
                object            = 'ZCLA'
                quantity          = 1
                toyear            = ls_entity-Fiscalyear
              IMPORTING
                number            = number_range_key
                returncode        = number_range_return_code
                returned_quantity = number_range_returned_quantity
            ).
          "Catch the error into the message
          CATCH cx_nr_object_not_found INTO DATA(lx_not_found).
              APPEND VALUE #(  %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                               %key      = ls_entity-%key
                               %msg      = lx_not_found
                            ) TO reported-zi_cla_exp_header.
              APPEND VALUE #(  %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                               %key      = ls_entity-%key
                            ) TO failed-zi_cla_exp_header.
            RETURN.
          CATCH cx_number_ranges INTO DATA(lx_ranges).
            APPEND VALUE #(  %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                               %key      = ls_entity-%key
                               %msg      = lx_ranges
                            ) TO reported-zi_cla_exp_header.
              APPEND VALUE #(  %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                               %key      = ls_entity-%key
                            ) TO failed-zi_cla_exp_header.
            RETURN.
        ENDTRY.
        ls_entity-NumClaim = number_range_key+14(6).
        "Append value to the table
        APPEND VALUE #( %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                        %key      = ls_entity-%key
                      ) TO mapped-zi_cla_exp_header.
    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

I have created  an early numbering implementation method like this. But it seems when I want to create data, it always output an error like below

I've already tried manual numbering insert by hard code it in the method. What should i do? Is there anyway i can check the append to the mapped-zi_cla_exp_header.?

I will attached the table definition also 

@EndUserText.label : 'Custom Table for Claim Expense Header'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #NOT_EXTENSIBLE
@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT
@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #A
@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED
define table zcla_exp_h {

  key client         : abap.clnt not null;
  key num_claim      : abap.numc(6) not null;
  name               : abap.char(64);
  description        : abap.char(128);
  datefrom           : abap.dats;
  dateto             : abap.dats;
  fiscalyear         : gjahr;
  companycode        : bukrs;
  costcenter         : kostl;
  created_by         : abp_creation_user;
  created_at         : abp_creation_tstmpl;
  last_changed_by    : abp_lastchange_user;
  last_changed_at    : abp_lastchange_tstmpl;
  local_last_changed : abp_locinst_lastchange_tstmpl;

}
@EndUserText.label : 'Custom Table for Claim Expense Item'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #NOT_EXTENSIBLE
@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT
@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #A
@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED
define table zcla_exp_item {

  key client         : abap.clnt not null;
  key num_claim      : abap.numc(6) not null;
  key fiscalyear     : gjahr not null;
  key item_num       : abap.numc(5) not null;
  date_post          : abap.dats;
  event_description  : abap.char(128);
  category           : abap.char(64);
  currency           : waers;
  amount             : abap.dec(23,2);
  local_last_changed : abp_locinst_lastchange_tstmpl;

}

Here is the behavior definition also 

managed implementation in class zbp_i_cla_exp_header unique;
strict ( 2 );

define behavior for ZI_CLA_EXP_HEADER //alias <alias_name>
persistent table zcla_exp_h
lock master
authorization master ( instance )
early numbering
//etag master <field_name>
{
  create ( authorization : global );
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly ) NumClaim;
  association _items { create; }
}

define behavior for ZI_CLA_EXP_ITEM //alias <alias_name>
persistent table zcla_exp_item
lock dependent by _header
authorization dependent by _header
//etag master <field_name>
{
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly ) NumClaim;
  association _header;
}

 

Thank you for the attention

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: OData Service field empty when creating Analytical List Page from Custom Analytical Query S/4 Public
entry.content:
System: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition — Release [2602]

Context:

I built a commercial margin analysis report following the standard key user extensibility flow:

  1. Custom CDS View (Analytical Cube scenario) on top of I_SalesOrderItemCube, associated with I_SalesDocument, I_FiscalCalendarDate, I_CustomerSalesArea, and I_SalesDocItemPricingElement.

     

  2. Custom Analytical Query built on that view, with calculated measures (weighted %Margin) and several dimensions.

     

  3. The query is Published (green status) and works correctly in Preview and in the Query Browser / embedded SAC view — I validated the calculations extensively and everything matches.

The problem:

When trying to create a KPI or Analytical List Page artifact from the "Custom Analytical Queries and Services" app / View Browser, the "OData Service" field appears empty in the dropdown (both when searching by CDS View and when searching directly by OData Service), preventing me from completing the artifact creation. No service appears under "Recently Published InA Services" either (shows "No data"), even though the query itself shows as published.

 

My question:

Is there an additional explicit step required to generate the internal InA/OData service that "Manage KPIs and Reports" consumes from a Custom Analytical Query, or is this an expected limitation for this scenario (Analytical Cube + multiple associated data sources)? Has anyone successfully created a KPI or ALP from a query with this kind of configuration?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: API in public cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone 

I have a task with third party in public cloud system want to give him all materials and stock , is there an standard api I can use 

thanks

entry.title: Unable to retrieve the price list region-wise or material-wise.
entry.content: As a part of third party integration. Price list is requested by them but unable to retrieve price list region wise or material wise. Kindly help me.

entry.title: Duplicate GST Validation Triggered for Unregistered Vendors Using "NA" as GST Number(Public Cloud Sy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Based on the recommendations provided in the SAP Community, we have implemented duplicate GST number validation by configuring the following:

  • SSCUI 102415 – Maintain Tax Number Categories

  • SSCUI 103601 – Change Message Control for Duplicate Tax Numbers

The duplicate validation is working as expected. The system prevents the creation of a new Business Partner when the GST Registration Number (Tax Category IN3) already exists for another Customer or Supplier.

However, we are facing an issue with unregistered vendors.

Current Business Process

For unregistered vendors, the business team:

  1. Creates a new Supplier Business Partner.

  2. Selects Tax Number Category = IN3 (GST Registration Number).

  3. Enters "NA" in the GST Number field, since the vendor is not GST registered.

As all unregistered vendors are maintained with the value "NA", the system considers it as a duplicate GST number and prevents the creation of subsequent unregistered vendors.

Our Question

What is the SAP standard approach for handling GST-unregistered vendors in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Specifically:

  • Is it recommended not to maintain Tax Category IN3 for GST-unregistered vendors?

  • Is there any standard configuration or business practice to allow multiple unregistered vendors without triggering duplicate validation?

  • Is there any alternative tax number category or indicator that should be used instead of maintaining "NA" under Tax Category IN3?

We would appreciate your guidance on the recommended SAP standard practice for this scenario.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Title: [S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition] Automatic Payments (F0770): how to post the payment directly W
entry.content:
Title: [S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition] Automatic Payments (F0770): how to post the payment directly WITHOUT creating a payment order

Environment
- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (Release: <fill in, e.g. 2602>)
- App: Manage Automatic Payments – Fiori ID F0770

Current behavior
When I execute a payment run in Manage Automatic Payments (F0770), the supplier open items are NOT cleared at execution time. Instead they seem to be reserved as a payment order.
As a result, when I try to clear the same items manually in Post Outgoing Payments (F1612), the action is disabled and I get:
"Item(s) 1 are part of a payment order and cannot be selected for clearing"
(This matches KBA 3503165.)
So my current payment method appears to be running in "payment order" mode.

What I want to achieve
I want the payment run to DIRECTLY post the payment document at execution time and immediately clear the supplier open item (posting the offset to the bank clearing / bank sub account) — i.e. I do NOT want a payment order to be created.

What I have checked so far (for reference only – not sure this is correct)
I suspect the "Payment order only" flag at the country-level payment method settings is involved (possibly SSCUI 101972 – Set Up Payment Methods for Each Country/Region for Payment Transactions), but I am not sure whether this flag is editable / the correct lever in Public Edition.

My question
Could someone provide the concrete, step-by-step configuration procedure to achieve DIRECT posting (no payment order) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, WITH the specific SSCUI IDs and Fiori App IDs for each step?
Specifically:
1. Exactly which setting needs to be changed, in which SSCUI (please include the SSCUI ID)?
2. What follow-on settings must be maintained (e.g. document type for payment in posting details)?
3. Any impact I should be aware of on Electronic Bank Statement clearing (since payment-order-number based matching would no longer apply)?
4. How to handle open items that are already blocked by an existing payment order?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Inbound Delivery Exceeds PO Quantity Error in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are encountering an error while creating/posting an inbound delivery against a purchase order.

Error Message:
M7 022 – Order quantity exceeded (Inbound delivery exceeds PO quantity)

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Automatic Printing of GR Label
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am experiencing an issue with the automatic generation of GR labels when posting a goods receipt for an inbound delivery using the Change Inbound Deliveries – Deliveries Fiori app.

Currently, the GR label is only printed when I select either the Collective Slip or Individual Slip option in the Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document app. However, when the goods receipt is posted through the Change Inbound Deliveries – Deliveries, no GR label output is generated.

Could you please advise how to configure the system so that a Goods Receipt label is automatically generated and printed whenever an inbound delivery is goods receipted?

So far I've tried changing the 'Number of Slips' in MM, the parameters in the Output Parameter Determination Fiori app under Goods Movement, and changing the Assign Printout Document Type to no avail. 

Kind regards,
James

entry.title: Unable to Reverse Account Maintenance Document Due to Error FCO_AVC_PS002
entry.content:
We successfully reversed the FI document with document type KP (Account Maintenance).
After that, we attempted to reverse the corresponding Account Maintenance document using the Display/Cancel Account Maintenance Document Fiori app.
During the reversal, the system fails with the following errors:
•    FCO_AVC_PS002 – The budget tolerance limit of 100.00% for WBS element R/PMV/01/01/02/13/02 has been reached.

CB User ID - CB9980000016

entry.title: Mass Asset Change Bot and mass asset transfer between asset classes
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I would like to activate the Mass Asset Change bot for a client scheduled to go live on 01.01.2027. However, I noticed that the Mass Update Asset Master Data (570) bot, which supports mass changes, is marked for removal from the store soon. Could you please confirm when this bot will be removed and whether an alternative bot is available for mass changes to asset master data?

In addition, my client needs to transfer assets in bulk from one asset class to another. I could not find a bot in the store that supports this process, and based on the available APIs, there does not appear to be an API for this scenario either. Could you please advise how we should proceed with mass asset transfer postings?

Best regards, 

Ioanna

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud procurement and sourcing Customization ?
entry.content: Where i can learn SAP Public Cloud procurement and sourcing Customization ?
